nasb.text: He inquired of the Lord for him, gave him provisions, and gave him the sword of Goliath the Philistine.”

esv.text: and he inquired of the Lord for him and gave him provisions and gave him the sword of Goliath the Philistine.”

cnv.text: 亞希米勒為他求問耶和華，給他糧食，又把非利士人歌利亞的刀給他。”

ccb.text: 亚希米勒为他求问耶和华，给他食物，还把非利士人歌利亚的刀给了他。”
